name: Himanshu Rajput
bio: Aryan Sharma is Ink Rise's lead realism artist, specializing in hyper-realistic portraits and black-and-grey masterpieces. With 7 years of dedicated practice, he has built a reputation for capturing the human form with photographic accuracy. His memorial portrait work has earned him recognition at multiple Indian tattoo conventions.

name: Lalit Rathore
bio: Priya Nair brings mathematical precision and spiritual depth to every design she creates. Her geometric mandalas and sacred geometry pieces are executed with ruler-perfect accuracy and a meditative quality that clients describe as transformative. She is also Ink Rise's expert in Sanskrit calligraphy and spiritual symbol tattoos.

name: Ankit Rajput
bio: Rohan Das is Ink Rise's colour specialist, with a background in fine arts and a passion for bringing vibrant, painterly compositions to skin. His neo-traditional and Japanese-inspired colour work transforms clients into walking canvases. Known for his bold compositions and mastery of colour theory, Rohan creates tattoos that look stunning for decades.
awards: Best Colour Work — Bangalore Ink Festival 2022
